calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-07-2020 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-27-2020 Continued To Oct-28-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion For Default Judgment
Off Calendar Sep-15-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Rieke, Inc., a Colorado corporation, doing business as Dynamic Events of Denver.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gerardo C. Sandoval. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-551-3680. Email: gcasey@sftc.org.

James A. Quadra, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Nicholas Algee, who was placed under oath and testified.
Mr. Algee appeared via CourtCall for this morning's proceedings.
No appearance by defendant Rieke, Inc., a Colorado corporation, doing business as Dynamic Events of Denver.
Plaintiff's Complaint for Negligence was filed on February 7, 2019.
Substitute service of plaintiff's Summons & Complaint on defendant Rieke, Inc., a Colorado corporation, doing business as Dynamic Events of Denver, occurred on May 17, 2019, and effectuated on July 7, 2020.
Order Granting plaintff's request to served the Amended Summons and Statement of Damages on defendant Rieke, Inc., a Colorado corporation, doing business as Dynamic Events of Denver, via publication was filed on February 3, 2020.
Proof of Publication of plaintiff's Amended Summons and Statement of Damages in the San Francisco Daily Journal was filed on March 27, 2020.
Proof of Publication of plaintiff's Amended Summons and Statement of Damages in the Denver Post was filed on April 1, 2020.
DOE defendants were dismissed on August 3, 2020.
Default as to defendant Rieke, Inc., a Colorado corporation, doing business as Dynamic Events of Denver, was entered on August 4, 2020.

Plaintiff Nicholas Algee submits the following exhibit for the Court's review:
Exhibit 1: Photograph depicting the injury to plaintiff's arm.........................ID/EVID

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Nicholas Algee, and against the defaulted defendant Rieke, Inc., a Colorado corporation, doing business as Dynamic Events of Denver, as follows:

General Damages - $1,500,000.00.
Special Damages - $966,000.00.
Costs - $3,288.33.

Total - $2,469,288.33.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Plaintiff STIPULATES to the return of the exhibit.
